name: Harvey Norman Holdings Limited
analysis: HVN's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 35% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$4.8600, stop A$4.5639, target A$6.2603 (4.73:1) — then trail it.
